sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80002" key="*patelloxa/rwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Πᾰτελλοχάρων</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[χᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πάτελλα, χαίρω</etym>) comic name of a parasite, <sense id="n80002.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Dish-friend, 'pique-assiette'</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:54" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.54</biblScope> </bibl> tit.</sense> </entryFree>
